name: GPT-4o Transcribe
description: A speech-to-text model that uses GPT-4o to transcribe audio with improved word error rate and better language recognition compared to original Whisper models.

examples.name: Basic Transcription
examples.description: Transcribe an audio file with default settings

output.text: The sun rises in the east and sets in the west. This simple fact has been observed by humans for thousands of years.

code_snippets.label: typescript

examples.name: With Language Hint
examples.description: Transcribe with a language hint for better accuracy

output.text: The beach was a popular spot on a hot summer day. People were swimming in the ocean, building sandcastles, and playing beach volleyball.

code_snippets.label: typescript

examples.name: Guided Transcription
examples.description: Use a prompt to guide transcription style and context

input.prompt: This is a technical discussion about Kubernetes and cloud-native architecture.

output.text: The library is a quiet and peaceful place where people go to read, study, and learn. The shelves are filled with books on every subject imaginable.

code_snippets.label: typescript

examples.name: High Temperature
examples.description: Higher temperature for more varied transcription

output.text: In the heart of the city, there is a large park where people go to relax and enjoy nature. The park has a beautiful pond with ducks and swans.

code_snippets.label: typescript

file.description: The audio file as a URL or data URI (data:audio/...;base64,...). Supported formats: flac, mp3, mp4, mpeg, mpga, m4a, ogg, wav, webm.

language.description: The language of the input audio. Supplying the input language in ISO-639-1 format will improve accuracy and latency.

prompt.description: An optional text to guide the model's style or continue a previous audio segment. The prompt should match the audio language.

temperature.description: The sampling temperature, between 0 and 1. Higher values like 0.8 will make the output more random, while lower values like 0.2 will make it more focused and deterministic.
